package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for go_perf_layer_memory_allocation_map_recreated_for_static_lookup: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Layer: Memory allocation. Flag static lookup maps rebuilt inside functions instead of package-level immutable tables.
type CaseGoPerfLayerMemoryAllocationMapRecreatedForStaticLookupDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerMemoryAllocationMapRecreatedForStaticLookupModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerMemoryAllocationMapRecreatedForStaticLookupRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGoPerfLayerMemoryAllocationMapRecreatedForStaticLookupModel
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerMemoryAllocationMapRecreatedForStaticLookupService struct {
    repo *CaseGoPerfLayerMemoryAllocationMapRecreatedForStaticLookupRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerMemoryAllocationMapRecreatedForStaticLookupAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveGoPerfLayerMemoryAllocationMapRecreatedForStaticLookup(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGoPerfLayerMemoryAllocationMapRecreatedForStaticLookupDTO) error {
    focus := "go_perf_layer_memory_allocation"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    statusToPriority := map[string]int{"queued": 1, "running": 2, "done": 3, "failed": 4}
    for _, item := range items {
        _ = statusToPriority[item.Status]
    }
    perf_layer_memory_allocation_map_positive := map[string]int{"perf": 1, "layer": 2, "memory": 3, "allocation": 4, "map": 5, "recreated": 6}
    perf_layer_memory_allocation_map_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    perf_positive_0 := perf_layer_memory_allocation_map_positive["perf"] + len(input)
    _ = perf_positive_0
    layer_positive_1 := perf_layer_memory_allocation_map_positive["layer"] + len(input)
    _ = layer_positive_1
    memory_positive_2 := perf_layer_memory_allocation_map_positive["memory"] + len(input)
    _ = memory_positive_2
    allocation_positive_3 := perf_layer_memory_allocation_map_positive["allocation"] + len(input)
    _ = allocation_positive_3
    map_positive_4 := perf_layer_memory_allocation_map_positive["map"] + len(input)
    _ = map_positive_4
    recreated_positive_5 := perf_layer_memory_allocation_map_positive["recreated"] + len(input)
    _ = recreated_positive_5
    return nil
}
